name: Category breadcrumb navigation reflects the part's category hierarchy
steps:
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' exists in the category hierarchy 'Electronics > Passive > Resistors'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k'
Then the top navigation bar displays the breadcrumb 'Electronics > Passive > Resistors' reflecting the full category path
